product_overview: Kilo CLI is an AI-powered command-line assistant for developers that helps them understand, search, and modify codebases through natural language. It supports contextual code intelligence, conversational coding help, file and command operations, and project-aware workflows directly in the terminal.
core_goals: Search and understand code across a project from the terminal
Ask natural-language questions about code and receive helpful explanations or suggestions
Create, edit, and manage files with AI assistance
Run shell commands with interactive confirmation and safety awareness
Adapt assistance based on the detected project structure, conventions, and tools
Coordinate specialized agents to handle coding tasks and reviews

features.name: Code Intelligence
features.description: Helps users search a codebase semantically, locate definitions, and trace references across files.
user_flows: Open Kilo in a project directory -> Ask to search for relevant code -> Review the matched results -> Open a definition from the search results -> Trace related references across files
Open Kilo in a project directory -> Ask for a function or class definition -> Review the located definition -> Follow cross-file references to understand usage

features.name: Conversational Coding Assistant
features.description: Lets users interact with the codebase using natural language to get explanations, code generation, refactoring help, bug analysis, and review feedback.
user_flows: Open Kilo in a project directory -> Ask a question about how code works -> Review the explanation -> Ask for a suggested improvement -> Review the recommended changes
Open Kilo in a project directory -> Request code for a new task -> Review the generated code -> Ask for a refactor -> Review the refactored result
Open Kilo in a project directory -> Ask for a code review -> Review the findings -> Ask for best-practice recommendations -> Review the guidance

features.name: File Operations
features.description: Allows users to discover, read, edit, and write files with AI assistance across one or more files.
user_flows: Open Kilo in a project directory -> Ask to find relevant files -> Review the discovered files -> Read a file with context -> Request an edit -> Review the updated content
Open Kilo in a project directory -> Ask to apply changes across multiple files -> Review the proposed modifications -> Confirm the changes -> Review the updated files

features.name: Command Execution
features.description: Allows users to run shell commands from the terminal with safety checks and command output capture.
user_flows: Open Kilo in a project directory -> Request a shell command to be run -> Review the command before execution -> Confirm the action -> Review the command output
Open Kilo in a project directory -> Ask to inspect command results -> Review captured output -> Use the output to continue the task

features.name: Project Awareness
features.description: Detects the active project type, reads configuration, and adapts assistance to the repository’s conventions and tools.
user_flows: Open Kilo in a project directory -> Start a session -> Let the assistant detect the project type -> Review the recognized framework or language -> Continue with project-specific help
Open Kilo in a project directory -> Ask about project conventions or test setup -> Review the detected configuration details -> Use the information to guide the next task

features.name: Agent System
features.description: Lets users delegate work to specialized agents for tasks such as reviewing, testing, and exploring code.
user_flows: Open Kilo in a project directory -> Assign a task to a specialized agent -> Review the agent’s progress -> Receive the completed result -> Continue with the next task
Open Kilo in a project directory -> Launch multiple independent tasks -> Review each task’s output -> Combine the results into a broader understanding of the codebase

features.name: Security & Safety
features.description: Protects sensitive information and requires user awareness for potentially destructive operations.
user_flows: Open Kilo in a project directory -> Attempt an operation that may affect files or commands -> Review the safety prompt -> Confirm the action if appropriate -> Continue with the task
Open Kilo in a project directory -> Ask to inspect sensitive project content -> Review the protected context handling -> Proceed with the safe, non-sensitive result

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: User contact form that redirects to WhatsApp
user_interactions: Click "LET'S TALK ON WHATSAPP" button to submit
